title: mangifera sumbawaensis
intro: Mangifera sumbawaensis is a species of plant in the family Anacardiaceae, specifically a type of mango tree native to the island of Sumbawa in Indonesia. The plant is known to have medicinal properties, particularly in its bark and leaves, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Mangifera sumbawaensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, relieve pain, and protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat digestive issues, fever, and other ailments.
